use_cases: Displaying user avatars in navigation headers or profile sections
Showing team member thumbnails in dashboards or admin panels
Representing users in comment sections or chat interfaces
Displaying customer avatars in e-commerce order management
Showing user presence indicators in real-time collaboration tools
ai_summary: A flat-style avatar component with square rounded corners and a notification badge overlay. Features multiple color variants (blue, red, yellow) for status indicators. Designed as a reusable atomic component for displaying user profile images with optional badge counts in various UI contexts.
